{
  "judge_id": "responsibility-bearing judge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.2": 4,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent identifies several conceptual issues, including the ambiguity of the contribution claim and the uneven logical ordering within the section. The suggested revision improves framing clarity.",
    "R1.2": "The agent flags several consistency issues, such as underspecified technical statements and prose-level points. The suggested revision addresses these issues.",
    "R1.4": "The agent names one prior work (the 'unified evaluation framework') but does not articulate the delta or map against other works.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for several claims, including the contribution claim and technical statements.",
    "RX.3": "The output is mostly within scope with no drifts.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free with no regressions.",
    "RX.5": "The agent annotates some changes with reasons but not all non-cosmetic changes."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.8,
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.6,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies several conceptual issues, including the ambiguity of the contribution claim and the uneven logical ordering within the section. The suggested revision improves framing clarity.
rationale.R1.2: The agent flags several consistency issues, such as underspecified technical statements and prose-level points. The suggested revision addresses these issues.
rationale.R1.4: The agent names one prior work (the 'unified evaluation framework') but does not articulate the delta or map against other works.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for several claims, including the contribution claim and technical statements.
rationale.RX.3: The output is mostly within scope with no drifts.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free with no regressions.
rationale.RX.5: The agent annotates some changes with reasons but not all non-cosmetic changes.
